variants.core_thesis: Refines V4 marketing POC into a production-aligned visual source of truth: applies 17 reconciliations from architecture § 11.2 (drops Active/Draft, 7-languages copy, /de paths; adds Server Transfer 3rd option, inline QuickRedirectForm, hero count header, Preview Data banner, decorative-CTA toasts). 6 HTML frames, 58 click targets, 15 CSS variables locked in single inventory per R-13.

values: Redirect Manager redesign with V4 Blok Elevated marketing POC as canonical visual base. Pure visual re-skin (D1 Option A). All 4 surfaces (IntroPage / Full Page / Context Panel / Dashboard Widget) in scope. V4 redesigned in full visual fidelity including speculative content; hardcoded mocks for not-yet-real values, tracked for follow-on data-plumbing PRD. Mixed motion budget (full on Index + Full Page; quieter on Context Panel + Dashboard Widget). Per-surface 'Preview data' banner labels mocks. Hybrid voice (marketing on hero / headline zones; utility-tool in workflow density).

stage_history.notes: 3 findings fixed (C1 hydration, M1 unhandled rejection, M2 letter-reveal class). 5 minor findings left for operator triage. 432/432 tests pass post-fix.

Automated suite green (432/432 tests, 53 files, 0 lint errors, clean build, all 11 structural guards pass). 4 code-review fixes verified in source. Manual AC verification PASS across US-R1..US-R5 + FR-R1..FR-R13. No new critical or major findings. 6 smoke gates pending operator interactive session. Status: tested_pending_smoke.

Operator-driven polish wave during live walkthrough (m5). 15+ iterations landed: dashboard widget wide-zone + 8 real-data tiles + animated bars + recently-shipped real data; Full Page real stat strip + workspace hero with real Last modified + 4 hero CTAs + View activity popover + Conflicts dialog; Context Panel full-width shell + page-route hero + split inbound/outbound count tile + direction toggle + condensed regex banner on toolbar row with refresh; in-map duplicate-source guard parity across all 4 write paths; no-flicker refresh; .elev-modal vs .elev-modal-content fix for Edit map dialog; 11 new screenshots in README. Tests: 460/460 (+28). Build clean.

All 6 smoke gates operator-passed (m2 + host_frame_smoke passed_with_caveats — operator-visual rather than Playwright recipe). Ship report at project-planning/plans/ship-report-20260515T163000Z.md. CHANGELOG PRD-002 entry already present; appended polish-wave addendum inline by /ship.
auto-lite emission from /ship (full docs already present from prior /document pass; /ship updated CHANGELOG inline with polish-wave addendum).

m1.description: Cloud Portal Test App loads and renders all 3 extension points without console errors
m1.evidence: Operator manual verification 2026-05-15 — all 3 routes load from the Cloud Portal Test App, no console errors. Screenshots 30, 40, 45 (Full Page general view, Context Panel iterations) captured live.

m2.description: 5-axis Playwright comparison (layout, typography, color, component anatomy, state fidelity) against pocs/poc-v1-prd002/ — light + dark + reduced-motion variants on all 3 surfaces
m2.evidence: Operator visual comparison 2026-05-15 against live PRD-002 build (no Playwright MCP run). All 3 surfaces verified in dark mode at iframe widths used by Cloud Portal Test App. POC clickdummy at pocs/poc-v1-prd002/ now lags production for Context Panel (split hero, direction toggle, toolbar row added during operator polish) — divergence accepted; POC refresh queued as follow-on.
m2.notes: POC clickdummy refresh deferred. Worth a small follow-on task to bring pocs/poc-v1-prd002/context-panel.html forward.

m3.description: Every PRD-000 CRUD path (create map / edit / delete / add mapping / reorder / edit mapping / delete mapping) executes successfully on real tenant in the redesigned UI. Inline quick-add on Context Panel exercises the same createRedirectMap / updateRedirectMap mutations.
m3.evidence: Operator manual verification 2026-05-15 — CRUD round-trip exercised live on solo / solo-website tenant. Create map (image 33 New redirect map dialog), edit map (image 41/46 Edit map settings), inline mapping edit (image 47), delete mapping, inline quick-add via Context Panel QuickRedirectForm with direction toggle all exercised against authoring GraphQL.

m4.description: JSON export + import wizard (incl. conflict resolution) work end-to-end on real tenant.
m4.evidence: Operator manual verification 2026-05-15 — export menu (image 34, Open in new tab / Copy / Download-soon) and import dialog (image 35, file picker + paste JSON + Validate & preview) exercised live.

m5.description: >=5-min operator session covering every redesigned surface and every flow. Zero unrecoverable errors. Operator confirms redesign reads as premium without visual regressions of PRD-000 functionality and that inline quick-add is at least as efficient as the prior modal.
m5.evidence: Operator-driven polish session 2026-05-15 covered all 3 surfaces end-to-end. 15+ iterations landed against live PRD-002 build during the session. Operator final confirmation: 'amazing thats it' / 'ok worked perfect' / 'amazing. Now let us call it done'. No unrecoverable errors; inline quick-add (with direction toggle) reads as more efficient than the PRD-000 modal.
m5.notes: Polish iterations captured in friction log under stage='post-ship-polish' (to be added if a polish-session manifest mode lands; for now they live in conversation history).

host_frame_smoke.description: Playwright clipped iframe screenshots vs POC on 5 axes per sitecore:marketplace-sdk-host-frame-testing skill recipe. This is the m2 gate tracking entry for the manifest smoke-outcomes gate check.
host_frame_smoke.evidence: See m2 evidence — operator visual comparison against the live PRD-002 build; no Playwright MCP run.
host_frame_smoke.notes: Tracking entry alias for m2; carries the same passed_with_caveats verdict.

operator_attention.item: V4 'Blok Elevated' marketing POC at pocs/poc-marketing-v4-blok-elevated/ is the canonical visual base. Refined POC for PRD-002 produced at /architect under pocs/poc-v1-prd002/.

Hardcoded mock data strategy: V4 speculative content (hero stat, sparkline, top-hit list, 4th metric tile) renders with hardcoded values in PRD-002. Per-surface 'Preview data' banner labels mocks. Tracked for follow-on 'data plumbing' PRD that wires real data into pre-built visual chassis.
Mixed motion budget: full V4 motion (drifting plumes, gradient text, kinetic reveals) on IntroPage + Full Page. Quieter on Context Panel + Dashboard Widget (hover lifts only).

Hybrid voice: marketing-grade on hero / headline zones (IntroPage, Full Page workspace hero, Dashboard Widget headline); utility-tool voice in dense workflow areas (table rows, modals, Context Panel body, inline forms).
Strict no-functional-change rule (D1). PRD-002 is pure visual re-skin; any UX improvements discovered during implementation become follow-on PRDs. Structural guard / code-review gate should enforce.

Full V4-feature classification table — operator answers at /create-prd PM critical review. PM produces complete inventory of every V4 element across all 4 frames classifying real vs trivial-reskin vs hardcoded-mock.
Motion performance inside Cloud Portal iframe — confirmed at /architect or /test. Risk that drifting plumes + frosted glass degrade host frame rendering.
Follow-on 'data plumbing' PRD (likely PRD-003 candidate) wires hardcoded mocks to real data sources. Scope sketched at brain-dump; full scope captured when that PRD opens.

D1 relaxed from 'pure visual re-skin' to 'V4-aligned redesign with reality validation' (ADR-0024). V4 UX evolutions ship (notably Context Panel modal→inline quick-add per ADR-0026). Current site/ source is canonical reality for enum values + component flows; PRD reflects shipped code, not stale PRD-000 prose (RedirectType is 3 values, not 4).

Context Panel modal (AddRedirectModal) → inline quick-add UX evolution (US-R5, ADR-0026) is the largest test-impact item in PRD-002. Existing modal-flow Vitest tests need rework or re-pointing. R-12 in PRD § 13; Lead Developer audits at /task-breakdown. Architect decides at /architect whether AddRedirectModal is removed entirely (Option A, recommended) or kept as fallback (Option B).

RedirectType enum confirmed 3 values (Redirect301 / Redirect302 / ServerTransfer) per site/lib/domain/types.ts:17 + site/lib/redirects/redirect-type-enum.ts:26. Redirect307 was dropped during PRD-000 Tranche 6a (real-tenant capture 2026-05-11; recorded in docs/decisions.md). PRD-002 reflects shipped code; PRD-000 prose mentions of 307 are inaccurate and superseded.

V4 feature classification complete — file-driven walk of full-page.html / context-panel.html / dashboard-widget.html with line refs; categorized (a) real / (b) re-skin / (c) hardcoded mock / (d) NEW V4 UX change. Full classification in prd-002.md § 11.

Refined POC at pocs/poc-v1-prd002/ lands at /architect — designer applies all reality reconciliations (drop Active/Draft, drop /de paths, drop '7 languages' line, hero count header bound to matchedGroups.length, etc.). Architect records V4-to-refined-POC diff explicitly per R-14 so PRD-002 § 11 line refs remain navigable.

Design-token drift (R-13) — V4-specific tunables (plume duration 28s, glass alpha 80%, hover-glow tint 14%, hero clamp 48-96px) must be defined in one CSS variable set (site/styles/elevated.css or equivalent) to prevent drift across files. Architect enforces at /architect.

Browser floor for backdrop-filter + color-mix(in oklch, ...) — Cloud Portal evergreen browsers (Chromium / Safari ≥14 / Firefox ≥113) likely fine; if older browsers must be supported, @supports not fallbacks required (recipe in prd-002 NFR-R3 + NFR-R4). Architect confirms at /architect.

ADR-0026 Option A locked: AddRedirectModal removed entirely (ADR-0028). Inline QuickRedirectForm handles add-to-existing-map and create-new-map (with auto-name + default flags). 'Create new map with full flag control' path lives at Full Page workspace via existing NewRedirectMapModal.

QuickRedirectForm semantics locked (ADR-0029): most-recently-updated matched map as default; RedirectType select disabled-with-display in add-to-existing path; auto-name `${pageSlug}-redirects` for create-new path. Resolves PRD AC-R2.4 ambiguity.

Full Page hero CTAs (View activity / Publish all) ship as DECORATIVE in PRD-002 (ADR-0030) — render with V4 chrome; onClick shows 'Coming in a follow-on release' Sonner toast. No new activity-log or bulk-publish backend in scope. Follow-on PRD wires real onClick.

z-index hierarchy locked: plume backdrop -1, page content 0, frosted topbar 40, HahnSoloFooter 50, modal overlay 100. Tactical commitment (not separate ADR); flows into elevated.css / elevated-plumes.css implementation.

Test-rework strategy: dedicated T7 tranche at /implement (R-12 mitigation). Lead Developer audits class-string assertions; QA Specialist enriches with TDD steps; AddRedirectModal tests re-pointed at QuickRedirectForm in T7.

SDK contract verification gate PASSED by enumeration. 0 new external SDK calls. 10 carry-over calls enumerated in architecture § 5.1 with .d.ts citations + envelope (DOUBLE .data.data for xmc.authoring.graphql, SINGLE .data for base-map). All shapes carry from PRD-000; no capture-pending items.
operator_attention.references: architecture § 5; supersedes /create-prd assumption about no SDK changes

Operator confirms redesign reads as premium and inline quick-add is at least as efficient as prior modal. Walk checklist at project-planning/smoke/m5-live-walkthrough-checklist-prd002.md.

Motion performance inside Cloud Portal iframe (NFR-R1) — not verifiable in automated testing. If operator observes jank during live walkthrough (backdrop-filter + plume animations), reduce --v4-plume-blur or plume opacity as a hotfix.

notes: PRD-001 was cancelled at Tranche 1 (ADR-0023). PRD-002 is the next operational PRD; numbering skips the cancelled slot.

Design base = V4 Blok Elevated marketing POC at pocs/poc-marketing-v4-blok-elevated/. Built 2026-05-13 as the winning variant of a 4-variant marketing exploration (V1 Aurora / V2 Brutalism / V3 Editorial / V4 Blok Elevated).
Scope: pure visual / surface re-skin. Functional surface stays 1:1 with PRD-000.
Mock data strategy: V4 speculative content renders with hardcoded values; per-surface 'Preview data' banner labels mocks; future data-plumbing PRD wires real data.
Mixed motion budget: full V4 motion on IntroPage + Full Page; quieter on Context Panel + Dashboard Widget.
Hybrid voice: marketing on hero / headline zones; utility-tool in workflow density.
PRD numbering: PRD-002. Branch prd-002 stacked off main (PRD-000 shipped via PR#1; PRD-001 cancelled; both already on main).
discovery_summary: confirmed_with_changes (IntroPage `/` dropped from scope; status pills use real RedirectType enum; D1 relaxed from pure-re-skin to V4-aligned-with-reality-validation)

critical_review: completed (4 blockers + 16 concerns + 7 nitpicks; option-B consistency pass applied — V4 POC re-walked element-by-element against current site/ source; PRD revised in place; 4 new ADRs landed)
sdk_surface_split: n/a (0 new SDK surfaces — pure visual redesign + one client-side interaction-pattern change)

PRD-002 V4-aligned redesign scope: 3 extension-point routes (Full Page + Context Panel + Dashboard Widget). IntroPage / out of scope. D1 relaxed: V4 UX evolutions (e.g. Context Panel modal→inline quick-add per ADR-0026) ship alongside chrome. Mock-data architecture via PREVIEW_DATA constants + PREVIEW_DATA_ACTIVE flags + per-surface 'Preview data' banner (ADR-0025).

4 new ADRs landed: ADR-0024 (V4 Blok Elevated visual base + relaxed D1), ADR-0025 (mock-data architecture), ADR-0026 (Context Panel inline quick-add), ADR-0027 (mixed motion budget). ADR README index updated.
RedirectType enum confirmed 3 values (Redirect301 / Redirect302 / ServerTransfer) per site/lib/domain/types.ts:17; 307 dropped during PRD-000 Tranche 6a (documented in docs/decisions.md).

architect run 2026-05-14: 3 new ADRs (0028-0030); ADR README index updated to 30 ADRs. SDK contract gate passed by enumeration (0 new calls; 10 carry-over enumerated). ADR-0026 Option A locked: AddRedirectModal removed entirely. R-13 mitigation: 15 CSS variables locked in single inventory. R-12 mitigation: dedicated T7 test-rework tranche.
adr_density_split: n/a (3 new ADRs in /architect run — under 5-ADR HARD STOP)
architecture: products/redirect-manager/project-planning/architecture/architecture-20260514T000000Z.md (553 lines, 11 sections, V4-to-refined-POC diff record in § 11.2)
